pi_items.source: PHOTO_URL assignment in setup_task.sh (verified that the download attempts this URL but it currently returns 404, causing the script to fallback to generating a dummy random noise image)

privileged_info_summary: The target visitor record is for 'Marcus Webb'. The photo to be attached is located at '/home/ga/Documents/visitor_photo_marcus_webb.jpg'. Note that because the original Wikimedia source URL is broken (returns 404), the environment's setup script falls back to generating a random noise image at this path instead of the intended portrait photo.
